findings.location: Source file beyond truncation point (after `.. _pjconf_json:` anchor)
findings.description: The automated pre-check reports 11 source headings but the knowledge file covers only 7 sections. The source file is truncated after `.. _pjconf_json:` — approximately 4 additional sections (pjconf.json詳細, lessImport.less詳細, and other build command/file specs) exist in the full source but are entirely absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Automated warning: 'Section count 7 < source headings 11'. Source ends with `.. _pjconf_json:` label indicating a section begins there but is not shown. The s7 設定ファイル section table lists pjconf.json and ${cssMode}.less as entries with their own ref anchors, implying full spec sections follow.

findings.location: s5 — :ref:`install` の設定, UI_PLUGINS_DIRS table row, 備考 column
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a note 'プラグインが個別のため両方を指定' for the UI_PLUGINS_DIRS entry, but the source table has no備考 (note) for this row.
findings.source_evidence: Source table for s5 install.bat: `UI_PLUGINS_DIRS  "ui_plugins_public,ui_plugins_manage"` — the備考 column is empty. Knowledge file row: `| UI_PLUGINS_DIRS | "ui_plugins_public,ui_plugins_manage" | プラグインが個別のため両方を指定 |`

findings.location: s3, s4, s5 — pathSettings/* property hints
findings.description: Sections s3, s4, and s5 contain tables with multiple pathSettings/* configuration properties (demoProjectPath, testProjectPath, pluginProjectPath) that are primary configuration targets but are not included in any section's hints. Only projectRootPath and webProjectPath appear in s3 hints; the rest are absent from all three sections.
findings.source_evidence: s3 source pjconf.json table first-column properties: projectRootPath, webProjectPath, demoProjectPath, testProjectPath, pluginProjectPath. s3 hints only list pathSettings/projectRootPath and pathSettings/webProjectPath. Same gap exists in s4 and s5.
